extraction_reasoning: The litigation tables disclose matters against the Company, promoters/directors and Group Companies, with no “By” rows. I counted the 8 criminal cases against Shakti Bio Science Limited; the Company’s 1 direct-tax and 6 indirect-tax cases are tax proceedings, while the 1 direct-tax matter against a promoter/director is excluded from the company/subsidiary tax count; no separate statutory/regulatory enforcement category is disclosed. The aggregate quantified amount against the Company is 9.66 + 190.49 + 1,851.22 lakhs = 2,051.37 lakhs, or 20.5137 crore; promoter/director and Group Company amounts are excluded. Contingent liabilities are disclosed as at March 31, 2018 in lakhs, with no stated Total row, so the listed components were summed: 427.84 + 1,851.22 + 190.49 + 0.00 + 1,473.02 + 789.22 = 4,731.79 lakhs = 47.3179 crore. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage, going-concern statement, or statutory auditor opinion status is disclosed; all lakh amounts were converted to crore by dividing by 100.
